paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Llama 2 improves upon Llama 1 through enhanced pretraining data, doubled context length, and grouped-query attention (GQA), resulting in stronger performance on academic benchmarks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: New mix of publicly available online data
raw_extraction.application: Chat, instruction following, general language tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing scalable, safe, and high-performance language models for open research and deployment
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.extension: Grouped-query attention (GQA) improves inference scalability for larger models
